messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: How do I move a task to another project?

Quick question — is there a way to move a task from one project to another without recreating it and losing the comment history? Couldn't find it in the docs.

response.content: {"category":"how_to","priority":"low","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about how to — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
